name: Drawer
description: Slide-over panel from left or right edge with backdrop overlay and width variants.

closeable.description: Whether the drawer can be closed by the user

header.description: Drawer title in the header bar

decision_rule: Use for detail panels, filters, and forms that don't need full-page context. Position right for detail/edit, left for navigation. In Filament, use Action::make()->slideOver() instead.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament, use Action::make()->slideOver() for slide-over panels
